query:
SELECT 
  status,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address REGEXP '^(Rua|Avenida|Alameda|Praça|Travessa|Largo|Estrada|Rodovia|Viela|Beco|Viaduto|Passagem|Vila|Ladeira|Parque|Ponte|Marginal|Acesso) ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as endereco_valido,
  SUM(CASE WHEN addressNumber IS NOT NULL AND addressNumber != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_numero,
  SUM(CASE WHEN complement IS NOT NULL AND complement != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_complemento,
  SUM(CASE WHEN description IS NOT NULL AND description != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_descricao
FROM establishments 
GROUP BY status;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute 
SELECT 
  status,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address REGEXP '^(Rua|Avenida|Alameda|Praça|Travessa|Largo|Estrada|Rodovia|Viela|Beco|Viaduto|Passagem|Vila|Ladeira|Parque|Ponte|Marginal|Acesso) ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as endereco_valido,
  SUM(CASE WHEN addressNumber IS NOT NULL AND addressNumber != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_numero,
  SUM(CASE WHEN complement IS NOT NULL AND complement != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_complemento,
  SUM(CASE WHEN description IS NOT NULL AND description != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_descricao
FROM establishments 
GROUP BY status;
